elements.grid_ref: E x 2-3', level +0.40 shown at doorway, floor box '3 +0.20 —'
D-C x ~3, box '3 +0.50 2', callout 'ห้องน้ำ ดูแบบขยาย WC.1 A-16'
D-C x 1-2, box '1 +0.60 1' — contains the main stair ST.2 (steps numbered 7,6,5,4,3,2,1 rising toward grid1/gridD; stair zone occupies the 1-to-~1'' west portion, hall portion ~1''-2)
~1, at row A edge beside เฉลียง, steps descend into the A-A' walkway strip — see detail A-18 (small step down เฉลียง/พักผ่อน +0.50/+0.60 to ทางเดิน +0.20)

elements.description: Floor level box '4 ±0.00 —' at the carport/pedestrian entry threshold, A-~A' x ~2-3 (hatched apron zone south of gridA, within the A-to-A' strip; apron's own printed dims 1.40/1.10/0.30 read at the grid2-3 side)

Circled numeral callouts (door number) and hexagon/box numeral callouts (window number) are printed at each room per the symbol legend (หน้า03). Legible tag clusters per-room: ทานอาหาร '1 +0.60 (1)', ครัว '1 +0.60 (1)', ซักล้าง '(2) +0.40, 3 +0.20 (—)', ห้องน้ำ '3 +0.50 (2)', เก็บของ '4 +0.60 (5)', โถง '1 +0.60 (1)', พักผ่อน '1 +0.60 (1)', จอดรถ '4 +0.20 (3)', เฉลียง '3 +0.50 (3)'. The bracket number is a floor-material category (matches the A-01 material list พื้น items 1-5), the parenthetical number is the door/window opening reference — whether each parenthetical tag is a circle (door) or hexagon (window) shape is not reliably distinguishable at this resolution for every room.

warnings: This is the ground-floor plan sheet (A-04, แปลนพื้นชั้น 1) of a 2-story house — the roof plan is on its own separate sheet (A-06, หน้า08), and the 2nd floor is on its own separate sheet (A-05, หน้า07, see sibling _หน้า07_floor_plan_upper.json).

GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER (reporting only, master file not edited): top dimension chain reads left to right: 1.10 (west overhang, beyond grid1) | 3.50 (grid1-2) | 3.00 (grid2-3) | 0.50 (east overhang, beyond grid3) — matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0, 2=3.5, 3=6.5) plus the master's dummy grids 1'(-1.10)/3'(7.0) exactly. Left dimension chain reads top to bottom: 1.50 (north overhang, above gridE) | 3.00 (gridE-D) | 2.20 (gridD-C) | 4.00 (gridC-B) | 1.50 (gridB-A, sub-shown as 0.50+1.00 near the entry) | 2.05 (south, below gridA) — matches the master grid's y_lines (E=0.0,D=3.0,C=5.2,B=9.2,A=10.7) exactly. The gridline master (หน้า00) currently flags its dummy grids 1'/3' as provisional pending cross-check against this architecture floor plan — on this sheet, the 1.10m west-of-grid1 zone appears to be the ซักล้าง/roof-overhang area and the 0.50m east-of-grid3 zone the ห้องน้ำ/roof-overhang area; both are built floor area (not pure roof overhang), consistent with the master's note that S-04/S-05 (structural) show a real beam+slab in these bays. Recommend the grid-master owner treat this as supporting (not yet conclusively confirming) evidence for the dummy grids. CASCADE_2026-07-19: three more dummy grids were added to the master by user (1''=2.25, A'=12.75, A''=13.7) and cascaded into this sheet where evidence exists: (a) A'(12.75)=A+2.05 -- this sheet's own left-chain '2.05 (south, below gridA)' ends exactly at the outermost boundary line of the ทางเดิน/entry-apron zone = A', zoom-verified; (b) 1''(2.25) -- the โถง stair/hall partition wall carries a printed '1.15' measured west from grid2, putting its east FACE at 2.35; 1''(2.25) matches its centerline within one wall thickness, 0.10m gap flagged not resolved; (c) A''(13.7)=A+3.0 has NO corresponding feature on this sheet -- nothing is drawn/dimensioned 3.0m south of gridA here (the sheet's own chain stops at 2.05); A'' presumably comes from another sheet, flagged for cross-check there.

Individual door/window counts and the circle-vs-hexagon (door-vs-window) glyph distinction per room were not confidently resolvable at this image resolution — flagged for zoom review rather than guessed, consistent with the same caveat on the sister houses' floor plans.

Building footprint is irregular at row A: gridA only spans grid1-2 (เฉลียง/บันได ST.1 area), not grid1-3 — the จอดรถ (carport, grid2-3 x gridC-gridB) is open/roofless at its south end per the roof plan (หน้า08), consistent with the gridline master's note about an irregular footprint (row A missing column 3).

Elevation-direction and section-cut callout bubbles are printed on this sheet (4-way compass bubble referencing A-07/A-08/A-09/A-10 for the 4 elevations; directional arrow tags '1/A-11', '2/A-12', '3/A-13' for the 3 sections) — read and cross-referenced when extracting those sheets, not re-itemized as elements here.
WC.1 is detailed on a dedicated 1:25 sheet (A-16, หน้า18, shared with WC.2) — this floor-plan-level box is superseded by that sheet for exact fixture layout; see _หน้า18_wc_plan.json.
